examples: Max sighed, sounding even more downhearted.
He needed a sounding board rather than thinking alone.
We'll always justify our actions with noble sounding theories.
And yet the engine, that growling, fierce-sounding engine, is actually a veteran 4.2-litre straight-six from Jaguar.
An optical laser reads the transparency and creates a wobbly, out-of-tune, almost eerie-sounding keyboard effect.
